'''鈭歞h-n-d''' ('''dhanada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rind|rind]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-n-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rind|rind]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-n-d
|-
! Lemma
| dhanada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhanadithi|dhanadithi]] || [[word:dhanadiji|dhanadiji]] || [[word:dhanadishi|dhanadishi]] || [[word:dhanadi|dhanadi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhanaduthuth|dhanaduthuth]] || [[word:dhanadujuj|dhanadujuj]] || [[word:dhanadushush|dhanadushush]] || [[word:dhanad|dhanad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhanaduthu|dhanaduthu]] || [[word:dhanaduju|dhanaduju]] || [[word:dhanadushu|dhanadushu]] || [[word:dhanadu|dhanadu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhanadufuth|dhanadufuth]] || [[word:dhanadufuj|dhanadufuj]] || [[word:dhanadufush|dhanadufush]] || [[word:dhanaduf|dhanaduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhanadethe|dhanadethe]] || [[word:dhanadeje|dhanadeje]] || [[word:dhanadeshe|dhanadeshe]] || [[word:dhanade|dhanade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhanadothoth|dhanadothoth]] || [[word:dhanadojoj|dhanadojoj]] || [[word:dhanadoshosh|dhanadoshosh]] || [[word:dhanad|dhanad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhanadotho|dhanadotho]] || [[word:dhanadojo|dhanadojo]] || [[word:dhanadosho|dhanadosho]] || [[word:dhanado|dhanado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhanadofoth|dhanadofoth]] || [[word:dhanadofoj|dhanadofoj]] || [[word:dhanadofosh|dhanadofosh]] || [[word:dhanadof|dhanadof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhanad忙th忙|dhanad忙th忙]] || [[word:dhanad忙j忙|dhanad忙j忙]] || [[word:dhanad忙sh忙|dhanad忙sh忙]] || [[word:dhanad忙|dhanad忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhanadathath|dhanadathath]] || [[word:dhanadajaj|dhanadajaj]] || [[word:dhanadashash|dhanadashash]] || [[word:dhanad|dhanad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhanadatha|dhanadatha]] || [[word:dhanadaja|dhanadaja]] || [[word:dhanadasha|dhanadasha]] || [[word:dhanada|dhanada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhanadafath|dhanadafath]] || [[word:dhanadafaj|dhanadafaj]] || [[word:dhanadafash|dhanadafash]] || [[word:dhanadaf|dhanadaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dhanadasha|dhanadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godhanadasha|godhanadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidhanadasha|gokidhanadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhanadn眉sha|dhanadn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godhanadnkn眉sha|godhanadnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidhanadn眉sha|gokidhanadn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhanadsh毛sha|dhanadsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhanadnksh毛sha|godhanadnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhanadsh毛sha|gokidhanadsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhanadrosha|dhanadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhanadnkrosha|godhanadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhanadrosha|gokidhanadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhanadmusha|dhanadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhanadnkmusha|godhanadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhanadmusha|gokidhanadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dhanadsherasha|dhanadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godhanadnksherasha|godhanadnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidhanadsherasha|gokidhanadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dhanadngasha|dhanadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godhanadnkngasha|godhanadnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidhanadngasha|gokidhanadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhanadyasha|dhanadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhanadnkyasha|godhanadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidhanadyasha|gokidhanadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dhanadyamasha|dhanadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godhanadnkyamasha|godhanadnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidhanadyamasha|gokidhanadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhanadn眉sh毛sha|dhanadn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhanadnkn眉sh毛sha|godhanadnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhanadn眉sh毛sha|gokidhanadn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhanadn眉rosha|dhanadn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhanadnkn眉rosha|godhanadnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhanadn眉rosha|gokidhanadn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhanadn眉musha|dhanadn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhanadnkn眉musha|godhanadnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhanadn眉musha|gokidhanadn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhanadsh毛n眉sha|dhanadsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhanadnksh毛n眉sha|godhanadnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhanadsh毛n眉sha|gokidhanadsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhanadsh毛rosha|dhanadsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhanadnksh毛rosha|godhanadnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhanadsh毛rosha|gokidhanadsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhanadsh毛musha|dhanadsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhanadnksh毛musha|godhanadnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhanadsh毛musha|gokidhanadsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhanadron眉sha|dhanadron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhanadnkron眉sha|godhanadnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhanadron眉sha|gokidhanadron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhanadrosh毛sha|dhanadrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhanadnkrosh毛sha|godhanadnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhanadrosh毛sha|gokidhanadrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhanadromusha|dhanadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhanadnkromusha|godhanadnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhanadromusha|gokidhanadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhanadmun眉sha|dhanadmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhanadnkmun眉sha|godhanadnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhanadmun眉sha|gokidhanadmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhanadmush毛sha|dhanadmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhanadnkmush毛sha|godhanadnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhanadmush毛sha|gokidhanadmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhanadmurosha|dhanadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhanadnkmurosha|godhanadnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhanadmurosha|gokidhanadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dhanad|dhanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dh忙n忙d|dh忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodhanad|hodhanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodh忙n忙d|hodh忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhanad|hohodhanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodh忙n忙d|hohodh忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dhanad|n眉dhanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉dh忙n忙d|n眉dh忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dhanad|n眉n眉dhanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dh忙n忙d|n眉n眉dh忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dhanad|n茂dhanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂dh忙n忙d|n茂dh忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dhanad|n茂n茂dhanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dh忙n忙d|n茂n茂dh忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludhanad|ludhanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludh忙n忙d|ludh忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhanad|luludhanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludh忙n忙d|luludh忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidhanad|lidhanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidh忙n忙d|lidh忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhanad|lilidhanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidh忙n忙d|lilidh忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodhanad|kodhanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodh忙n忙d|kodh忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhanad|kokodhanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodh忙n忙d|kokodh忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedhanad|kedhanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedh忙n忙d|kedh忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhanad|kekedhanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedh忙n忙d|kekedh忙n忙d]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
